CHARAGTER CREATION
EXPLORER MEDIC
Born in the back woods of the planet New Abilene you learned early to be tough and resourceful: Iocal legend has it that you single handedly killed bear at age three_ but was really wolf at age nine you still have the pelt ! Seeking better fortune your family started tarm where you picked up your obsession with piloting and driving: You slept in the tractor and flew the crop duster more ften than your parents did. Military service is mandatory in the Magistracy; and you were exception_ Within your first few weeks of basic training; your inquisitive nature and aptitude for science earned you place in the acade my on Luxen: You enrolled in the prestigious Canopian Medical Sciences Research and Training Complex_ where you earned your first-ranker diamond as field medic _ You put the tracking Skills from your youth t0 good use during your first tour of duty: leading your  squad cache of ostech relics on an uncharted planet 5 AIl did not go so smoothly in your military career, how- Ciel Posted t0 the arctic world of Thraxa you were cap tured in raid by forces from the Marian Hegemony and held prisoner On distant planet for two years_ You managed to escape and make it offworld; cut off from Canopian support; you traveled on any JumpShip you could using your skills guide and medic t0 pay your way: Ultimately, YOu arrived back in Canopian space ad rejoined your old unit; However; the lure of exploration   proved too much for you_ After your most recent stretch of boring garrison duty,8 you re looking for change whole galaxy iS out there and you're ready for anything might throw your wayl
